column1: #mapping_set_title: All mappings of MP terms to HPO terms generated by MGI

#mapping_set_description: "Mappings created by Mouse Genome Informatics (MGI) by lexical matches between term and synonym labels. Lexical mappings are made by comparing the text of each label and calling a match whenever the labels are identical. Term label to term label matches are all skos:exactMatch. Term label to synonym label are made depending on the synonym type (eg. exact synonym = exactMatch). For narrow and broad synonyms the match type is identical to synonym type when the match is HP term label to MP synonym label but reversed when it is MP term label to HP synonym label. Synonym to synonym matches are made for exact synonyms to any other type of synonym the same as for term label to synonym matches. Non-exact to non-exact synonym matches are currently only made for HP narrow to MP narrow (this is a broadMatch). The other possible matches either had no examples or gave incorrect matches and thus were not included in the mappings. Matches were reviewed manually during the creation of the mapping pipeline but are not routinely manually reviewed. Pipeline was created in 2024 and matches are updated regularly."
